levers_metric_metadata_title: Publisher-declared metadata (structural; less analytical weight than the NLP measures)
levers_groupby_select_aria: Categorical metadata field to group by
levers_groupby_empty: No categorical metadata for this scope (Negative Space).
levers_withheld_fields_lead_one: {count} metadata field not present on every one of the {sources} scoped source{sourcePlural} (metadata asymmetry — a publisher choice, WP-003 §3.2):
levers_withheld_fields_lead_other: {count} metadata fields not present on every one of the {sources} scoped source{sourcePlural} (metadata asymmetry — a publisher choice, WP-003 §3.2):
levers_withheld_metrics_lead_one: {count} metric not present on every one of the {sources} scoped source{sourcePlural} — withheld so a panel-wide binding cannot yield silently empty cells:
levers_withheld_metrics_lead_other: {count} metrics not present on every one of the {sources} scoped source{sourcePlural} — withheld so a panel-wide binding cannot yield silently empty cells:
levers_withheld_fields_toggle_title: Offer these fields anyway. Sources lacking the chosen field render Negative Space, not a forced zero.
levers_withheld_metrics_toggle_title: Offer these metrics in the picker anyway. The panel renders only the sources that carry the chosen metric — no empty cells, no scope change needed.
levers_withheld_showing_metrics: ✓ Showing withheld (only sources with data render)
levers_degenerate_lead_one: {count} dimension is constant across this scope — present but signal-free, so dropped from the picker (disclosed, not silently filtered — ADR-039):
levers_degenerate_lead_other: {count} dimensions are constant across this scope — present but signal-free, so dropped from the picker (disclosed, not silently filtered — ADR-039):
levers_lowsignal_lead_one: {count} dimension is near-constant in this scope — still selectable, but it carries little signal:
levers_lowsignal_lead_other: {count} dimensions are near-constant in this scope — still selectable, but they carry little signal:
levers_composition_split_title: One Cell per source or per ScopeGroup (small-multiples)
levers_composition_overlay_title: One Cell — sources rendered as separate viridis-coloured lines on a shared canvas
levers_composition_merged_title: One Cell — sources aggregated into a single joint-corpus chart
levers_window_reset_title: Drop this panel's window override and inherit the global default
levers_layer_gold_title: Gold — aggregated, computed metrics (the finding). The default.
levers_layer_silver_title: Silver — the individual documents behind the metric. Per-source access gate (WP-006 §5.2).
levers_compare_disabled_title: Needs a validated baseline + cross-context equivalence (Phase 115) — not available for this metric yet. Click ? to learn why.
levers_compare_help_body: — which asserts the metric measures the same thing in each. AĒR only allows that once a baseline + a cross-context equivalence study exist for the metric (ADR-016 / WP-004);
levers_compare_help_post: has none yet, so these stay disabled rather than show an unproven comparison.
levers_spread_title: How strongly nodes repel each other — higher spreads a crowded graph apart
levers_settle_title: Seconds the large-scale layout runs before it freezes. Raise it to give a big map more time to relax into clusters.
levers_connections_title: Show or hide the edge lines between nodes. A nodes-only view is clearer for a dense map; clustering still shows the relationships.
levers_band_title: Toggle the ±1σ uncertainty band around each series
levers_scale_title: Shared: every cell in this panel uses one axis domain, so identical values plot at identical positions (directly comparable). Free: each cell scales to its own data.
levers_scale_note: ⓘ Cells with a custom X/Y axis always read free — independent of this.
levers_labels_title: Source form keeps each entity in its original language; App language relabels Wikidata-linked nodes to the app language ({language}). Unlinked nodes always keep their source form.
levers_sankey_empty: No categorical metadata for this scope (Negative Space).
levers_facet_empty: No categorical metadata for this scope (Negative Space).
levers_cells_reset_title: Clear the custom per-cell configuration on all {count} overridden cell(s) and return them to the panel default
